name: Applitools Visual AI Testing API
what_it_does: Applitools Eyes API for AI-powered visual testing and monitoring. Uses Visual AI to detect meaningful UI differences across browsers, devices, and viewports. Enables AI agents to retrieve visual test results, manage batches, access Eyes dashboards, and integrate visual intelligence into CI/CD and release workflows.
use_cases: Retrieving visual AI test results and UI diff reports from QA automation agents
Managing test batch status and cross-browser visual comparisons from CI/CD agents
Analyzing UI consistency across devices and viewports from design QA agents
Integrating visual regression signals into release decision agents
not_for: Functional or behavioral test automation (Applitools is visual-focused)
Simple screenshot comparison without AI noise reduction
Teams without cross-browser UI consistency requirements
best_when: An enterprise UI team wants AI agents to leverage Applitools' Visual AI for intelligent cross-browser regression detection integrated into release pipelines.
avoid_when: Simple screenshot diffing suffices — Applitools is premium priced and designed for complex, component-rich UIs.

auth.notes: Applitools API key authentication. Keys available in Eyes dashboard. Team-scoped API keys.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: limited checkpoints/month for open source projects
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise tiers; checkpoint-based pricing
pricing.notes: Enterprise visual AI testing platform. Free for open source. Commercial pricing by checkpoints.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits based on plan concurrency

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — SDK + REST API integration required
Visual AI results require baseline approval before diffs are meaningful
Applitools 'Eyes' checkpoint model — agents must understand batch/step lifecycle
Visual screenshots contain full application UI — handle data with care
Cross-browser runs increase checkpoint consumption rapidly — monitor quota
agent_readiness.security_notes: Screenshots capture sensitive application UI including PII. SOC2. API key authentication. EU data residency available.

security_score_components.security_notes: UI screenshots with potential PII. SOC2 certified. EU data residency option. API key scoped to team.
